messages.content: Hello! I would like to chat with support.

Thank you for contacting us! 🌟
In which language are you comfortable speaking today? Please choose from below / अपनी पसंदीदा भाषा चुनें:

1. English
2. Hindi (हिंदी)
3. Hinglish (Transliterated Hindi)

Reply with 'English', 'Hindi', or 'Hinglish' to set your choice.
Thank you for selecting English! I am here to assist you with any questions about our supreme custom commodities or general utility goods. Please let me know how I can help you today.
Conversation automatically closed. Reason: Customer Inactivity
Customer submitted feedback survey: Rating of 2 star(s).
